solutions.solution: In the given dice, 1 + 4 = 5 ⇒ 1 + 5 = 6 ⇒ 4 + 5 = 9. Clearly, the sum of the digits on the adjacent faces is not equal to 7. Hence, the given dice is a standard dice. As digits sum of opposite faces of a standard dice is 7, hence, the face opposite to the face having digit 4 will have the digit 3. 4 + 3 = 7
